name: SBX: Invasion
short_description: SBX Invasion is a tower defense and base building game. You pilot a ship that can build defenses and must fight off alien invaders in each stage. Quickly build defenses and towers in each stage before you are overrun by enemy forces.
detailed_description: SBX Invasion is a fast paced tower defense and base building game.  You pilot a ship equipped with a powerful build ray, and your trusty cannon and you must defend each sector from hordes of invading enemy ships.  You must battle your wit and quickness against the terrible invading Fuscian army!  A mix of tower defense, space combat, and base construction, SBX: Invasion is sure to keep you frenetically defending the galaxy!
about_the_game: SBX Invasion is a fast paced tower defense and base building game.
